sessions_sample.raw: E: 2 - 3 miles  Optional: walk 2 min. every .5 mile
sessions_sample.parsing_note: The optional walk breaks may complicate parsing the session role.

sessions_sample.raw: ★ 4  LR: 3 miles  Optional: walk 2 min. every 1 mile
sessions_sample.parsing_note: The presence of a priority symbol and optional walk breaks may confuse session classification.

sessions_sample.raw: E: 3 miles  Optional: walk 1 min. every 1 mile  XT
sessions_sample.parsing_note: The optional walk breaks could lead to ambiguity in session role.

sessions_sample.raw: 3 - 4 miles as 10 min. WU; I: 4 - 6 x 1 min. at Z4 w/2 min. recovery; 10 min. CD
sessions_sample.parsing_note: Complex structure with warm-up, intervals, and cool-down may complicate parsing.

sessions_sample.raw: ★ 3 miles as 10 min. WU; I: 6 - 10 x 1 min. at Z4 w/2 min. recovery; 10 min. CD
sessions_sample.parsing_note: Similar to previous session, the multi-part structure may confuse the parser.

unhandled_patterns.issue: The parser may not correctly interpret the optional walking breaks as part of the session.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Recognize and parse optional walking breaks as part of the session details.

unhandled_patterns.pattern: 3 - 4 miles as 10 min. WU; I: 4 - 6 x 1 min. at Z4 w/2 min. recovery; 10 min. CD
unhandled_patterns.issue: The parser may struggle with sessions that include multiple components (WU, intervals, CD) in a single line.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Allow for multi-part session descriptions and parse each component separately.

new_abbreviations.example: 3 - 4 miles as 10 min. WU; I: 4 - 6 x 1 min. at Z4 w/2 min. recovery; 10 min. CD
3 - 4 miles as 10 min. WU; I: 4 - 6 x 1 min. at Z4 w/2 min. recovery; 10 min. CD
I: 4 - 6 x 1 min. at Z4 w/2 min. recovery

prompt_improvements: Recognize and parse optional walking breaks as part of the session details.
Allow for multi-part session descriptions and parse each component separately.
anomalies: The plan includes optional walk breaks that are not consistently formatted, which may lead to confusion in parsing.
